analyst_observations: CRITICAL: Without skill, auditor test modified BaseRefDataModel (shared by 5+ screens), introducing a breaking change. With skill, all 3 tests correctly left base class untouched.
Without skill, cashflow test used a bridge pattern (mirror StateFlows + sync callbacks) instead of directly replacing ObservableField — adds ~65 lines of unnecessary state duplication.
ViewBinding delegate pattern: with skill consistently used project's `by viewBinding()` delegate. Without skill, 2/3 tests used local val binding in onCreateView instead.
Code organization: with skill consistently structured Fragment into setupListeners/setupObservers/setupBaseModelObservers/observeLiveDataActions. Without skill had more variation.
ErrorState placement: with skill created a standalone ErrorState data class with factory methods. Without skill varied — one nested inside DataModel, one at base package level.
Time savings: with skill averaged 421s vs 552s without (24% faster), likely because the skill frontloaded design decisions.
